/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Atwood.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Atwood.dir/src/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Atwood.dir/libs/implot/implot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Atwood.dir/libs/implot/implot_items.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Atwood.dir/libs/implot/implot_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Atwood.dir/libs/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o -o Atwood  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/ssd2/Study/Programation/C++/atwood_sim/build/libs/imgui-sfml libs/imgui-sfml/libImGui-SFML.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so
